title: Eurozone austerity distributional incidence
subtitle: inconclusive (coverage) — could not compute periphery/core mean changes for both 2008 and 2014. Periphery Gini n=0/5, core Gini n=0/6, periphery AROP n=0/5, core AROP n=0/6.
